events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: cable tray with fill ratio exceeded, rough-complete stage, NEC Art. 392 applies. Fill ratio exceeded means non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium-high. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Need corrective action.

    "Cable tray fill ratio exceeded beyond NEC Art. 392 allowable limits",
    "Overfilled tray restricts heat dissipation and may damage conductor insulation",
    "Existing installation is non-compliant at rough-complete stage and requires rework before closeout"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop additional cable installation in affected tray sections",
    "Calculate actual fill cross-sectional area against NEC 392 limits for the tray type and cable category",
    "Redistribute cables, add parallel tray runs, or upsize tray to bring fill within code limits",
    "Re-inspect after corrective rework before proceeding to closeout"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Art. 392 governs cable tray fill. An exceeded fill ratio is a direct code violation, creating thermal and mechanical risks and making the roughed-in work non-compliant. The work must fail until corrected.",

}
